On April 3rd, 2024, beginning around 2 PM, I was at the Cedar Heights Elementary School playground at 1100 Cedar Avenue picking up my daughter when I noticed several issues that I want on record with the district. The wood-fiber surfacing under the climbing structure has eroded down to bare gravel under the slide exit and under the swing set, leaving an estimated four-inch drop instead of the cushioning layer. One of the swing chains on the rightmost swing has a partially separated link near the top connector. The metal slide had a surface temperature that felt hot enough to burn skin in the direct afternoon sun, and a parent next to me said her son was crying after coming down it. I am not aware of any injury today but I am submitting this as a hazard report so the district can inspect and repair before someone is hurt.
